artPrompt: An evocative scene of a leering carny barker perched beside a rigged soul-scale, sweeping one arm toward the viewer mid-pitch as ghostly translucent soul-weights pile on the pan and tip it. Tattered striped tents and a wheel of fortune blaze in carnival red and hot gold behind, sickly neon and ember sparks drifting, a rigged bargain unfolding, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Guess Your Weight in Souls
text: When Guess Your Weight in Souls enters the battlefield, the carny guesses the number of cards in target opponent's hand out loud (you may peek for two seconds, no longer). If the guess is exact, that player discards two cards. If it's off by one, they discard one. If it's way off, the carny is embarrassed and you gain 1 life out of pity.
flavorText: Within three pounds or your money back. The money is in souls. There are no refunds on souls.

extras.fourthWall: guess the hand size out loud after a brief peek
